{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323055645A11D99649E008686D7A7"}"},"total":61},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7539086137307005758","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比较接近现实，人性善恶，不以外表论长短！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755334356,"group_id":"7506590951838600216","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢每一个简单快乐的明天","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N25XDdctUQP/8o2ItsFOKj0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"720874191468295","user_name":"十月浅紫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"720874191468295","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1656137139,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506590951838600216","book_info":{"abstract":"结婚二十五年，李明霞专心致志相夫教女，照顾老人，是个典型的贤妻良母。
原以为自己家庭幸福，人生美满。五十岁那年，却是意外发现了丈夫耗资几百万的家外家，里面住着全身名牌，年轻漂亮的小三和一个十岁左右的私生子。
结婚二十五年，李明霞一直住在娘家陪嫁给自己的老旧小区房里，穿着做女孩子时买的衣服。
更重要的是，公公婆婆也知道老公的家外家，并且亲昵地叫老公的私生子为“乖孙”。
发现真相，李明霞才明白，自己精心营造的幸福生活原来只是自己一厢情愿的梦境而已。
我们离婚吧。她果断提出。
老公冷笑：你除了会洗衣做饭，还会干啥？离婚了你只能当乞丐。
婆婆怒怼：生了个赔钱货，还好意思甩脸子？一把年纪了离什么婚？也不怕遭人笑话。
娘家人和闺蜜也劝：老年夫妻老来伴，睁一只眼闭一只眼，忍忍就过去了。
忍？她都五十岁了，凭什么还要委曲求全？余生，她要为自己而活！
她只身杀入职场，事业如日中天。爱情不期而遇。再婚生活春风十里，美不胜收。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1a87d8a16e3d1a5a241255596deeead5","author":"在黑夜里抽烟的鹰","author_id":"","book_id":"7506590951838600216","book_name":"五十离婚后，我的人生开挂了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7506591368668529176","read_count":"19659","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"463313"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"206","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,虐渣,家长里短","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ae27332b97d49773502c2154d06ba237~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400605&x-signature=8uI2YUs2HUgY9KfK4EI4rTbSY8w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3808324347510080","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"128"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323055645A11D99649E008686D7A7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":47163,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":51680,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6142},"user_ac
